case_title: MARK HYLES VS. ARMANDO RODRIGUEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
SUMMONS ISSUED ON FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF HYLES, MARK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYLES, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 142 EDINBURGH STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94112 SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYLES, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYLES, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYLES, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYLES, MARK SERVED JUN-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
